title: Resolva 20300520 Pro Weed Killer Liquid Sachets Xtra Tough 6 x 100ml, Natural
features: KILLS TOUGH WEEDS TO THE ROOT - Its systemic action is effective against Bindweed Nettle Bramble grasses and many others
PRE-DOSED SACHETS - No measuring required Just mix 1 sachet content in 1 Litre of water and spray!
CONTAINS GLYPHOSATE - Always read the label and product information before use
Package Dimensions: 5.8 L x 19.6 H x 13.6 W (centimeters)
description: Product Description Resolva Pro Xtra Tough Liquid Sachet is a concentrate systemic weed killer for controlling annual and deep-rooted perennial weeds It delivers effective results even on tough weeds like nettle thistle brambles and many others The pre-dosed sachet requires no measuring and is easy to use Directions 1. Mix 1 sachet content in 1 Litre of water and spray. 2. Apply from March to October when weeds are actively growing and have a large leaf area. 3. Avoid all contact with wanted plants. 4. Take extreme care to avoid spray drift as this product kills all green plant growth, including grass. 5. If it rains within 6 hours of application, then effectiveness may be reduced and re-treatment is recommended. 6. Very persistent weeds may require repeated treatments once new growth appears. 7. Always read the label and product information before use. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. Avoid all contact with wanted plants. Take extreme care to avoid spray drift as this product kills all green plant growth, including grass! Avoid contact with skin and eyes. If ingested, seek medical help immediately. See more
